name: Connector Proposal
about: Propose a new health data connector
title: "Connector: [Data Source Name]"
labels: connector, proposal
---

## Data Source

**Name:** [e.g., Oura Ring, Garmin Connect, Apple Health]
**Website:** [URL]

## What data does it provide?

<!-- Which health categories? Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Sleep
- [ ] Activity
- [ ] Nutrition
- [ ] Vitals (heart rate, HRV, blood pressure)
- [ ] Body metrics (weight, body fat)
- [ ] Mental health (mood, stress)
- [ ] Lab results (blood tests, biomarkers)
- [ ] Medication
- [ ] Environment (temperature, air quality)
- [ ] Calendar / schedule
- [ ] Other: ___

## How does the data get accessed?

<!-- API, file export, scraping, etc. -->

- [ ] Public API (with API key)
- [ ] OAuth-based API
- [ ] File export (CSV, JSON, XML)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Who will build it?

<!-- Are you volunteering to build it, or proposing it for someone else? -->

- [ ] I will build this connector
- [ ] I'm proposing this for someone else to build
